ui_mdns_config_t(3) Library Functions Manual ui_mdns_config_t(3)

NAME

ui_mdns_config_t - Configuration for TUI discovery.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/ui/mdns.h>

Data Fields


int timeout_ms
Maximum time to wait for responses (default: 2000). int max_servers
Maximum servers to collect (default: 20). bool quiet
Suppress discovery messages (default: false).

Detailed Description

Configuration for TUI discovery.

Definition at line 69 of file ui/mdns.h.

Maximum servers to collect (default: 20).
